case_title: JOSE L CHAVEZ IXCHOP VS. HYUN KIM

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXCHOP, JOSE L CHAVEZ AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY IXCHOP, JOSE L CHAVEZ AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--KARINA OROCIO. DEFENDANT WAVIES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IXCHOP, JOSE L CHAVEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $85.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
